## Why It Works

This Tweet works for 2 reasons: it captures a universal truth about customer service in a way that's both impactful and easy to understand, and it uses contrast — satisfied vs. upset — to drive home the impact. It's a quick, good lesson packed into a bite-sized format.

## Template

[Topic or Field] 101:
A [Positive Outcome] leads to [Limited but Positive Effect], but a [Negative Outcome] leads to [Widespread Negative Effect].

## Example

SEO 101:
A well-optimized page will drive decent targeted traffic, but a poorly-optimized page drives away actual customers.
